title: nf-core/plasmodiumdrugres pipeline - params.allele_table schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.allele_table

specimen_name.errorMessage: specimen_name must be provided and cannot contain spaces.

target_name.errorMessage: target_name must be provided and cannot contain spaces.

seq.errorMessage: Sequence of microhaplotypes (seq) must be provided and only contain A,C,T,G.

reads.errorMessage: reads must be an integer, but is optional.
